input_text: Orang kampung masuk KL pun tak reti nak behave. Memang dasar bangsa tu, tak pernah ada kelas. Duduk flat je la selamanya.
reason: Combines social class attack with ethnic generalisation. Implies an entire ethnic group lacks class and belongs in low-cost housing.
suggested_rewrite: Perpindahan dari luar bandar ke bandar memerlukan sokongan adaptasi yang lebih baik daripada kerajaan dan masyarakat setempat.

input_text: Tengok la artis tu, dah kaya raya tapi moral hancur. Memang la, anak kampung jadi kaya terus lupa diri. Patut kena hukum biar jadi pengajaran.
reason: Attacks a public figure by linking their scandal to rural origins as a class-based insult and calls for punitive humiliation.
suggested_rewrite: Artis yang terlibat skandal perlu dipertanggungjawabkan melalui saluran yang betul, tanpa mengaitkan latar belakang mereka.

input_text: Kahwin lain agama ni memang haram dan pengkhianat bangsa. Keluarga patut potong hubungan terus. Malu satu kampung tau.
reason: Labels interfaith marriage as betrayal of race and religion, advocates family ostracism, and invokes communal shaming.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan antara agama memang menimbulkan persoalan kompleks. Keluarga boleh berbincang dengan penuh hormat tanpa memutuskan hubungan.

input_text: Vaksin tu ada DNA babi, memang sengaja nak rosakkan umat Islam. Doktor pun dah admit tapi media tutup cerita. Jangan percaya mereka!
reason: Spreads false vaccination misinformation tied to religious purity concerns, fabricates doctor admissions, and undermines public health.
suggested_rewrite: Keraguan tentang kandungan vaksin boleh dirujuk terus kepada JAKIM dan KKM yang telah mengesahkan status halal vaksin di Malaysia.

input_text: Budak2 Melayu kat universiti ni masuk sebab kuota je, bukan sebab pandai. Tu pasal la grad quality makin drop. Tengok je result diorang.
reason: Generalises all Malay university students as undeserving quota admissions, attacking their intellectual capability as a group.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem kemasukan universiti perlu dikaji supaya keseimbangan antara merit dan peluang terjamin untuk semua pelajar tanpa mengecilkan pencapaian mana-mana kumpulan.

input_text: Pergi la balik India kalau tak puas hati duduk sini. Kamu semua pendatang, jangan lupa tu. Tanah ni bukan hak kamu.
reason: Uses 'go back' rhetoric to delegitimise the citizenship and belonging of Malaysian Indians, a nativist attack.
suggested_rewrite: Semua warganegara Malaysia mempunyai hak yang sama di bawah Perlembagaan. Perbezaan pendapat boleh diselesaikan melalui dialog.

input_text: Pembangkang semua DAP cina kafir. Nak rampas kuasa Melayu Islam. Kita kena bangkit pertahankan agama dan bangsa kita sebelum terlambat!
reason: Frames political opposition as an ethnic-religious existential threat, using 'kafir' label and calling for communal mobilisation.
suggested_rewrite: Parti politik perlu dinilai berdasarkan dasar mereka, bukan label kaum atau agama. Semua rakyat Malaysia berhak menyertai proses demokrasi.

input_text: Tak payah la marah pasal harga rumah. Kau orang Cina memang control property market. Monopoli semua tanah, Melayu nak beli pun tak mampu.
reason: Blames Chinese Malaysians as a group for property market issues, framing them as monopolists deliberately excluding Malays.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah harga rumah yang tidak mampu milik memerlukan penyelesaian dasar yang menyeluruh termasuk kawalan spekulasi dan lebih banyak rumah mampu milik.

input_text: Artis Melayu skandal sikit je viral. Cuba kalau artis kaum lain, media tutup mata. Double standard gila. Sebab media pun kaum dia control.
reason: Promotes conspiracy that media is ethnically controlled and applies double standards to scandals based on race.
suggested_rewrite: Liputan media terhadap skandal artis seharusnya konsisten tanpa mengira latar belakang. Kritik terhadap media boleh difokuskan pada profesionalisme, bukan kaum.

input_text: Dah la kahwin Cina, lepas tu nak tukar agama lagi. Memang dasar pengkhianat. Mak bapak patut malu ada anak macam ni.
reason: Labels interfaith marriage and potential conversion as betrayal, shames the individual and their parents.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan campur dan isu agama adalah keputusan peribadi yang kompleks. Keluarga boleh memberi pandangan dengan penuh kasih sayang tanpa menghina.

input_text: Org kampung Kelantan ni masuk KL, buat malu je. Tak reti bahasa, tak reti berpakaian, semua benda pun nak complain. Balik la kampung.
reason: Attacks Kelantanese migrants to KL with classist and regionalist insults, telling them to go back to their kampung.
suggested_rewrite: Proses urbanisasi memerlukan penyesuaian. Masyarakat bandar seharusnya membantu pendatang dari luar bandar beradaptasi, bukan merendahkan mereka.

input_text: Kawan aku apply kerja kat company Cina, terus kena reject sebab nama Melayu. Memang racist company diorang ni. Kita patut boikot semua.
reason: Generalises a single hiring incident to all Chinese-owned companies and calls for ethnic boycott.
suggested_rewrite: Diskriminasi dalam pengambilan pekerja memang salah dan boleh dilaporkan kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja. Tapi kita tidak sepatutnya menghukum semua perniagaan berdasarkan tindakan segelintir.

input_text: Bisnes Melayu memang takkan maju. Buka kedai pun ikut musim, pastu tutup. Nak harap bantuan kerajaan je. Orang Cina takkan macam tu.
reason: Stereotypes Malay businesses as always failing while elevating Chinese businesses, a comparative ethnic insult.
suggested_rewrite: Kadar kegagalan perniagaan kecil tinggi tanpa mengira kaum. Sokongan seperti mentoring dan akses modal perlu diperkukuh untuk semua usahawan.

input_text: Bini aku cakap doktor suruh vaksin anak, tapi ustaz kata haram. Aku ikut ustaz la, dia lebih arif pasal halal haram dari doktor kafir.
reason: Rejects medical advice in favour of unqualified religious opinion, labels doctor as kafir, and risks child's health.
suggested_rewrite: Keraguan tentang vaksin boleh dirujuk kepada panel fatwa kebangsaan yang telah mengesahkan vaksin sebagai harus. Doktor dan ustaz boleh dirujuk bersama untuk keputusan yang bijak.

input_text: Politician X tu bukan setakat rasuah, memang keluarga dia semua penipu dari dulu. Darah kotor, dari mak sampai anak cucu semua sama je.
reason: Attacks a politician's entire family lineage as inherently corrupt using 'dirty blood' framing, extending insult beyond the individual.
suggested_rewrite: Dakwaan rasuah terhadap mana-mana ahli politik perlu disiasat dan dibuktikan di mahkamah. Keluarga mereka tidak seharusnya dihukum bersama.

input_text: Kerja gomen semua penuh Melayu, private sector pulak penuh Cina. Masing-masing racist, tapi Melayu lagi teruk sebab guna kuasa kerajaan.
reason: Makes sweeping claims about ethnic domination in both sectors while singling out Malays as worse, escalating communal blame.
suggested_rewrite: Kepelbagaian tenaga kerja perlu dipertingkatkan di semua sektor. Ini memerlukan usaha bersama dari kerajaan dan swasta tanpa saling menyalahkan.

input_text: Anak saudara aku nak masuk UiTM tapi result dia tip top. Kalau Cina atau India dengan result sama, confirm masuk UM. Sistem ni memang untuk bodohkan Melayu je.
reason: While expressing a legitimate concern about university admissions, frames it as a system designed to make Malays stupid, insulting the community.
suggested_rewrite: Pelajar cemerlang dari semua kaum layak mendapat tempat di universiti pilihan mereka. Sistem kemasukan perlu lebih telus dan berasaskan merit.

input_text: Siapa yang vote kerajaan ni semua bodoh. Majoriti Melayu la tu. Asyik kena tipu tapi masih percaya. IQ rendah memang susah nak tolong.
reason: Insults government voters as stupid and attributes it to their ethnicity, combining political contempt with ethnic degradation.
suggested_rewrite: Pengundi membuat pilihan berdasarkan pelbagai faktor. Kita boleh tidak setuju dengan keputusan mereka tanpa merendahkan kecerdasan atau kaum mereka.

input_text: Aku rasa benda ni jadi sebab Melayu terlalu baik hati. Kita bagi tanah, bagi peluang, tapi kaum lain pijak kepala kita. Dah tiba masa Melayu bangun.
reason: Frames other ethnicities as collectively ungrateful and treading on Malays, calling for ethnic awakening which implies confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: Semua rakyat Malaysia menyumbang kepada pembangunan negara. Perbincangan tentang hak dan peluang perlu dilakukan secara adil tanpa retorik permusuhan.

input_text: Lepas COVID baru nampak siapa yang betul2 selfish. Kaum lain langsung tak nak tolong, tapi bila nak bantuan mesti datang dulu. Parasit betul.
reason: Calls other ethnic groups parasites and accuses them of selfishness during COVID, a dehumanising communal attack.
suggested_rewrite: Semasa pandemik, rakyat Malaysia dari semua kaum membantu satu sama lain. Kritik boleh difokuskan pada dasar yang lebih baik untuk kesiapsiagaan bencana.

input_text: Vaksin mRNA tu sebenarnya eksperimen Yahudi atas umat Islam. Tengok la negara OIC yang ambil vaksin tu semua rakyat sakit-sakit. Fikir sendiri la.
reason: Combines anti-Semitic conspiracy with anti-vaccination misinformation, falsely claiming vaccines target Muslim countries.
suggested_rewrite: Vaksin mRNA telah melalui ujian klinikal ketat dan digunakan di seluruh dunia. Sebarang keraguan boleh dirujuk kepada KKM dan pakar perubatan yang bertauliah.

input_text: Sape suruh kahwin orang bukan Islam. Padan muka skang anak-anak confuse tak tau identiti. Ni akibat ikut nafsu, bukan ikut agama.
reason: Mocks people in interfaith marriages as deserving suffering, shames their children, and reduces the choice to lust.
suggested_rewrite: Anak-anak dari perkahwinan campur memerlukan sokongan dan bimbingan, bukan penghakiman. Keluarga boleh membina identiti yang kuat tanpa mengira latar belakang.

input_text: Orang Sarawak ni bila masuk Semenanjung perangai macam orang hutan. Tak tau etika, cakap pun tak faham. Patut duduk seberang je.
reason: Dehumanises Sarawakians as uncivilised 'orang hutan', attacking their speech and behaviour, advocating for their exclusion.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia Timur dan Semenanjung mempunyai budaya yang berbeza tetapi sama-sama kaya. Perbezaan harus disambut, bukan dijadikan bahan ejekan.

input_text: Melayu kahwin awal lepas tu beranak banyak, pastu komplen miskin. Siapa suruh tak rancang? Orang Cina plan elok-elok tu pasal berjaya.
reason: Blames Malay poverty on reproductive choices while elevating Chinese as superior planners, a harmful ethnic comparison.
suggested_rewrite: Pendidikan perancangan keluarga dan sokongan ekonomi penting untuk semua komuniti. Kemiskinan berpunca dari banyak faktor, bukan pilihan kaum.

input_text: Kerajaan bagi bantuan kat Rohingya tapi anak Melayu sendiri kelaparan. Ni semua salah kaum lain yang lobby kerajaan tolong pendatang asing.
reason: Blames other ethnic groups for government aid to refugees, pitting local communities against vulnerable refugees along ethnic lines.
suggested_rewrite: Bantuan kepada rakyat tempatan dan pelarian perlu diimbangkan. Ini isu dasar kerajaan, bukan salah mana-mana kaum.

input_text: Dia org Indian convert Islam pun perangai tak berubah. Memang darah kotor, tukar agama pun takkan jadi orang baik.
reason: Claims ethnic blood determines character even after religious conversion, a deeply racist 'dirty blood' trope combined with religious gatekeeping.
suggested_rewrite: Penilaian seseorang seharusnya berdasarkan tindakan dan akhlak mereka, bukan latar belakang etnik. Setiap muallaf berhak diterima dengan baik.

input_text: Bos aku Cina memang suka exploit pekerja Melayu. Suruh kerja overtime tapi tak bayar. Semua towkay Cina sama je, minum darah pekerja.
reason: Generalises all Chinese employers as exploitative based on one experience, using vampiric imagery to dehumanise.
suggested_rewrite: Eksploitasi pekerja adalah salah tanpa mengira kaum majikan. Pekerja yang tidak dibayar overtime boleh membuat aduan kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja.

input_text: Org Melayu memang tak reti berniaga online. Tengok je Shopee seller, 90% Cina. Sebab otak bisnes bangsa kita memang kurang compared to them.
reason: Claims Malays inherently lack business intelligence compared to Chinese, internalising and spreading ethnic inferiority narratives.
suggested_rewrite: Penyertaan dalam e-dagang bergantung pada akses digital, modal, dan latihan. Program sokongan yang lebih baik boleh membantu semua usahawan tanpa mengira kaum.

input_text: Jangan percaya ubat moden, semua tu bahan kimia yang rosakkan badan. Nabi dulu guna madu dan habbatussauda. Ikut sunnah, bukan ikut kafir.
reason: Rejects modern medicine entirely using religious framing, labels medical science as following disbelievers, dangerous health misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Pengubatan tradisional dan moden boleh saling melengkapi. Islam menggalakkan berubat dan mencari rawatan terbaik. Rujuk doktor untuk penyakit serius.

input_text: Kerajaan patut stop bagi biasiswa kat non-Bumi. Duit tu untuk anak bangsa kita. Kalau diorang pandai sangat, pergi la cari scholarship luar negara sendiri.
reason: Advocates excluding non-Bumiputera from scholarships entirely, dismissing their rights as citizens to educational support.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem biasiswa perlu mengambil kira merit dan keperluan. Semua warganegara Malaysia menyumbang cukai dan layak mendapat peluang pendidikan.

input_text: Habis la negara ni kalau PM bukan Melayu Islam. Kaum lain jadi PM mesti gadai tanah Melayu. Kena pertahankan sampai titisan darah terakhir.
reason: Implies non-Malay/Muslim leaders would betray Malay interests, uses blood rhetoric to advocate ethnic political exclusivity.
suggested_rewrite: Perlembagaan menetapkan syarat untuk jawatan PM. Semua pemimpin, tanpa mengira kaum, bertanggungjawab kepada semua rakyat Malaysia.

input_text: Kalau non-Muslim nak komen pasal Islam, diam la. Korang tak faham apa-apa. Jangan sibuk campur urusan agama kami. Mulut tu jaga sikit.
reason: Aggressively silences non-Muslim commentary on Islam with implicit threats, rejecting interfaith dialogue entirely.
suggested_rewrite: Dialog antara agama memerlukan sensitiviti dan pengetahuan. Semua pihak boleh berbincang dengan hormat asalkan memahami konteks dan beradab.

input_text: Kat area rumah aku semua kedai dah kena ambil alih Bangla. Orang tempatan macam mana nak hidup? Ni semua gara-gara towkay Cina yang upah pekerja murah.
reason: Scapegoats both Bangladeshi migrants and Chinese employers for local economic hardship, attacking two communities simultaneously.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pekerja asing dan kesan kepada peniaga tempatan perlu ditangani melalui dasar imigresen dan ekonomi yang lebih baik, bukan menyalahkan kaum tertentu.

input_text: Dulu orang Melayu gentle and sopan. Sekarang semua dah jadi macam kaum lain, materialistik dan tak beragama. Pengaruh buruk hidup campur macam ni.
reason: Blames perceived moral decline on living alongside other ethnicities, implying racial mixing corrupts Malay values and subtly advocating segregation.
suggested_rewrite: Perubahan nilai dalam masyarakat dipengaruhi oleh banyak faktor global. Memelihara budaya dan agama boleh dilakukan tanpa menyalahkan masyarakat majmuk.

input_text: Artis tu tangkap basah dgn perempuan bukan Islam. Memang dah jangka, org famous mcm dia mmg suka main dgn kafir. Hukum dia ikut syariah!
reason: Uses 'kafir' to describe a non-Muslim woman in a scandal, demands shariah punishment for consensual adult relationships, religiously degrades both parties.
suggested_rewrite: Skandal peribadi seharusnya ditangani secara tertutup dan melalui saluran yang betul, tanpa menggunakan label agama yang menghina.

input_text: These scholarship quotas are a joke. One race takes everything, the rest of us eat scraps. No wonder the smart ones all migrate.
reason: Frames scholarship policy as racial theft, generalising one group as undeserving beneficiaries and stoking brain-drain resentment along ethnic lines.
suggested_rewrite: The scholarship allocation system should be reviewed to ensure merit and need are properly balanced so talented students of all backgrounds are supported.

input_text: Government supporters are all one race la, they just vote for their own kind. Opposition is the only multiracial choice. Don't be fooled by these people.
reason: Reduces government support to a single ethnic bloc, framing political choice as purely racial and delegitimising voters of a specific ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: Both government and opposition have supporters from various backgrounds. Voters should evaluate parties based on policy rather than ethnic assumptions.

input_text: That influencer deserves every bit of hate she's getting. Cheap woman from Sabah, what do you expect? These East Malaysian girls are all the same.
reason: Degrades a public figure with gendered slurs and stereotypes all East Malaysian women based on one individual's scandal.
suggested_rewrite: Public figures should be held accountable for their actions, but this should not become an excuse to stereotype people from any region.

input_text: These Malay businessmen cannot compete on merit so they hide behind AP and government contracts. Born spoon-fed, die spoon-fed.
reason: Paints all Malay entrepreneurs as incapable and solely dependent on government privileges, a sweeping ethnic insult.
suggested_rewrite: There is a legitimate debate about whether certain business policies create dependency, but this should focus on policy reform rather than demeaning an entire community.

input_text: Since when do we let pendatang run our economy? Look at all the top companies - all controlled by you-know-who. Real Malaysians are being sidelined.
reason: Uses 'pendatang' (immigrant) framing to delegitimise non-Malay Malaysians' economic participation and implies they are not 'real' Malaysians.
suggested_rewrite: Economic equity is important, but all citizens contribute to Malaysia's economy. Policies should ensure fair opportunities without questioning anyone's right to participate.

input_text: Party X supporters are basically just Chinese chauvinist la. They don't care about Malaysia, only care about their own race getting rich. Typical.
reason: Reduces an entire political party's supporters to ethnic chauvinism, delegitimising multiracial political participation.
suggested_rewrite: Political parties should be critiqued based on their policies and track record, not by stereotyping their supporters along racial lines.

input_text: I dated a Malay girl once, her family literally threatened me because I'm not Muslim. These people are stuck in the stone age fr. Never again.
reason: Uses a personal dating experience to insult all Malays/Muslims as backwards, generalising from one family to an entire community.
suggested_rewrite: Interfaith relationships face real challenges in Malaysia, especially regarding conversion expectations. This deserves empathetic dialogue, not stereotyping entire communities.

input_text: U know what's wrong with this country? Too many races trying to live together. Oil and water don't mix bro.
reason: Frames Malaysia's multiracial society as fundamentally incompatible and implicitly advocates ethnic separation.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's diversity brings challenges, but also incredible strengths. The solution is better policies for integration, not giving up on living together.

input_text: That actress from KK thinks she can make it big just because she's pretty. Typical Sabahan mentality - all looks, no substance. Stay in your kampung la.
reason: Attacks a Sabahan public figure with gendered and regional stereotypes, dismissing East Malaysians as superficial.
suggested_rewrite: Success in entertainment requires talent and hard work regardless of where someone is from. Regional stereotypes are unfair and inaccurate.

input_text: Don't eat at Mamak restaurants anymore guys. These Indian Muslim places are dirty and they cheat on portions. Support our own people's businesses instead.
reason: Generalises all Mamak restaurants as dirty and dishonest, then calls for ethnic-based business boycott.
suggested_rewrite: If you have concerns about hygiene or service at any restaurant, you can report it to the health department. Support all local businesses based on quality.

input_text: My Malay colleague got promoted over me despite less experience. Everyone knows it's because of skin colour, not competence. This country rewards mediocrity.
reason: Attributes a colleague's promotion entirely to race, implying the individual is mediocre and only succeeded due to ethnic privilege.
suggested_rewrite: If promotion criteria seem unclear or unfair, it's worth raising with HR. But we should avoid assuming a colleague's success is undeserved based on their ethnicity.

input_text: This halal cert thing is just a scam by Malay authorities to tax non-Muslim businesses. Classic extortion wrapped in religion.
reason: Frames halal certification as ethnic extortion, mocking the religious significance and accusing Malay authorities of corruption.
suggested_rewrite: The cost and process of halal certification can be improved for transparency and efficiency, but the system serves a legitimate religious and consumer protection function.

input_text: My friend shared that the Sinovac vaccine was designed to make Muslims infertile. Her ustazah confirmed it. Better to use traditional herbs instead.
reason: Spreads dangerous fertility misinformation about vaccines using religious authority, and promotes unproven herbal alternatives.
suggested_rewrite: Vaccine safety concerns should be addressed by qualified medical professionals. Malaysia's NPRA has approved all vaccines used locally after rigorous testing. Consult your doctor.

input_text: Opposition won because of Chinese votes la. These people only vote for their own kind. When will they become real Malaysians and think about the country?
reason: Questions Chinese Malaysians' patriotism based on voting patterns and implies they are not 'real' Malaysians.
suggested_rewrite: Voters of all backgrounds have the right to choose representatives they believe in. Questioning patriotism based on voting patterns undermines democratic principles.

input_text: Why are Indians always so loud and dramatic? My neighbour plays Tamil songs at max volume during Deepavali like they own the whole taman. So inconsiderate.
reason: Stereotypes all Indians as loud and inconsiderate, using a festival noise complaint to insult the entire community.
suggested_rewrite: Noise during festivals can be managed through community agreements and local council guidelines. All celebrations should be respectful of neighbours.

input_text: My ex was Malay and she literally couldn't manage money. Spent everything on makeup and clothes. That's their culture bro, no financial sense at all.
reason: Uses one relationship experience to stereotype all Malays as financially irresponsible, combined with gender stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Financial management varies by individual, not ethnicity. Judging an entire community based on one person's habits is unfair and inaccurate.

input_text: Why do Chinese Malaysians still can't speak proper BM after generations here? Shows how much they care about this country. Pendatang mentality never changes.
reason: Uses language proficiency to question Chinese Malaysians' patriotism and belonging, invoking 'pendatang' framing for citizens.
suggested_rewrite: Bahasa Malaysia proficiency varies across individuals of all backgrounds. Encouraging multilingualism strengthens national unity better than questioning anyone's belonging.

input_text: Tamil schools should be shut down. They create division. These people refuse to integrate and then complain about not getting jobs. Can't have it both ways.
reason: Calls for closure of Tamil schools and blames the Indian community for self-segregation, denying their educational rights.
suggested_rewrite: Vernacular education is constitutionally protected and valued by communities. Integration can be improved through shared extracurricular activities and better national school standards.

input_text: These Malay uber drivers always take the long route to charge more. They think non-Malays are stupid and easy to cheat. Happened to me three times already.
reason: Generalises all Malay ride-hailing drivers as cheats who deliberately target non-Malays, projecting personal incidents onto an entire ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: If drivers take longer routes, report them through the app. Route issues happen with drivers of all backgrounds and can be addressed through proper channels.

input_text: Indian politicians are the worst - they only care about their own community's temples and Tamil schools. Never contribute to the bigger picture of Malaysian development.
reason: Stereotypes all Indian politicians as narrow and communal, dismissing their contributions to national development.
suggested_rewrite: Politicians of all backgrounds should balance community concerns with national interests. Indian Malaysian leaders have contributed significantly to various national policies.

input_text: Malaysia will never progress because 60% of the population is Malay and they just don't have the drive. Look at Singapore - once they removed the deadweight they soared.
reason: Calls Malays 'deadweight' preventing national progress, using Singapore comparison to dehumanise the majority ethnic group.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's development challenges are systemic and require policy reform. Comparing countries should focus on governance models, not demeaning any ethnic group.

input_text: Indian guys who date Malay girls are just doing it to get into the community. Classic infiltration tactic. Their real loyalty is always to their own kind.
reason: Frames interethnic dating as community infiltration, questioning Indian men's loyalty and sincerity in relationships.
suggested_rewrite: People date across ethnic lines for the same reason anyone dates - genuine connection. Questioning motives based on ethnicity is prejudicial.

input_text: Local business owners in JB are struggling because Singaporean Chinese come and buy everything cheap. And our own Malaysian Chinese help them. Traitors to Malaysia.
reason: Labels Malaysian Chinese as traitors for perceived collaboration with Singaporean shoppers, framing economic activity as ethnic betrayal.
suggested_rewrite: Cross-border shopping affects local businesses regardless of who shops. Solutions include strengthening the ringgit and supporting local commerce through better policies.

input_text: Whenever there's a flood, the Orang Asli and kampung Malays just wait for handouts. Zero initiative. That's the real reason they stay poor, not discrimination.
reason: Victim-blames flood-affected rural communities as lacking initiative, denying systemic factors contributing to poverty.
suggested_rewrite: Flood victims often lack resources and infrastructure to recover independently. Government and community support systems need strengthening for vulnerable communities.

input_text: Every CNY these Chinese burn paper money and set off fireworks until 3am. So inconsiderate. If we played the azan that loud they'd complain. Hypocrites.
reason: Uses CNY complaints to create a false equivalence with azan, pitting religious practices against each other and labelling Chinese as hypocrites.
suggested_rewrite: Noise during celebrations and religious observances should be managed respectfully. Community dialogue and local bylaws help balance everyone's needs.

input_text: 华人做生意就是这样，把马来人的店都挤垮了。这是经济战争，我们要团结起来抵制他们的店。
reason: Frames normal business competition as ethnic warfare and calls for communal boycotts against Chinese-owned businesses.
suggested_rewrite: 小商家面对激烈竞争时需要政府的扶持政策，不应该把商业竞争变成族群对立。

input_text: 每次看到马来人做生意不行就怪华人，真的很好笑。他们就是懒，不愿意吃苦，还要政府保护。
reason: Stereotypes Malays as lazy and incapable in business, dismissing legitimate policy concerns as ethnic character flaws.
suggested_rewrite: 商业竞争力涉及多方面因素，包括资本获取和市场经验。各族群应该互相学习，政策也应该公平扶持所有有需要的企业家。

input_text: 印度人开的店都很脏，我从来不去。他们的文化就是这样，不注重卫生。大家小心点。
reason: Generalises all Indian-owned businesses as unhygienic and attributes it to cultural deficiency, encouraging avoidance.
suggested_rewrite: 卫生标准应该适用于所有餐饮场所，不分种族。有问题可以向卫生局投报，不应该以偏概全。

input_text: 马来人的孩子全靠quota进大学，真正聪明的华人和印度人反而没位子。这个国家太不公平了。
reason: Implies all Malay students only gain admission through quotas, not ability, while stereotyping Chinese and Indians as inherently smarter.
suggested_rewrite: 大学录取制度应该平衡扶弱政策和学术成绩，确保每个学生都有公平的机会，而不是以种族来判断能力。

input_text: 别相信那些印度人医生，他们的学位都是买来的。要看病就找华人或者洋人医生，比较安全。
reason: Falsely claims Indian doctors have bought degrees and advises avoiding them, an ethnic smear against medical professionals.
suggested_rewrite: 选择医生时应该看他们的资质和经验，不应该以种族来判断专业能力。马来西亚的医学认证制度适用于所有医生。

input_text: 这些马来政客只会煽动种族情绪，骗选票。整个UMNO都是种族主义者的集团，应该被禁止。
reason: Brands an entire political party and its supporters as a racist collective that should be banned, dehumanising political opponents.
suggested_rewrite: 任何政党如果利用种族情绪来获取选票都应该被批评，但应该通过民主程序来表达不满，而不是笼统地标签化所有成员。

input_text: 华人女生不要跟马来男生约会，他们只会要你masuk Islam。到时候后悔就来不及了。
reason: Warns against interethnic dating by stereotyping all Malay men as only wanting religious conversion, spreading communal fear.
suggested_rewrite: 跨文化恋爱确实涉及宗教和文化差异的挑战。双方应该坦诚沟通期望，而不是以偏概全地避开某个群体。

input_text: 不要跟马来人做生意，他们不守信用，到时候钱收不回来你就知道了。华人跟华人做就好了。
reason: Stereotypes all Malays as untrustworthy in business and advocates ethnic insularity in commerce.
suggested_rewrite: 做生意时应该根据对方的信誉和记录来判断，而不是根据种族。商业信任建立在专业表现上。

input_text: 看看这些拿了scholarship的马来学生，毕业后都去政府部门混日子。真正有能力的人反而没有机会。
reason: Stereotypes all Malay scholarship recipients as wasting their education in government jobs, implying they lack ambition or ability.
suggested_rewrite: 奖学金制度应该确保获得者充分发挥潜力，无论是在公共还是私人领域。评估应该基于表现，而非种族假设。

input_text: 华人区的学校设备齐全，马来区的学校破破烂烂。政府只会照顾自己人，这就是种族歧视的证据。
reason: Frames educational infrastructure disparities as deliberate ethnic discrimination, ignoring complex funding dynamics.
suggested_rewrite: 学校设施的差距确实需要关注，但原因涉及资金分配、地区发展等多种因素。应该推动所有学校获得平等资源。

input_text: 这些拿着datuk title的马来商人，背后都是靠关系和贪污。真正做生意的华人从来不需要title来证明自己。
reason: Claims all Malay titled businessmen are corrupt while elevating Chinese entrepreneurs, a comparative ethnic smear.
suggested_rewrite: 荣誉称号应该授予真正有贡献的人。商业成功靠的是努力和策略，这在所有族群中都一样。

input_text: 中医比西医好多了，那些马来医生开的药都有side effect。宁愿喝凉茶也不要吃他们的药。
reason: Disparages Malay doctors' prescriptions as harmful while promoting unverified traditional remedies, combining health misinformation with ethnic bias.
suggested_rewrite: 传统医学和现代医学各有优势，可以互补。不应该根据医生的种族来判断药物的安全性，而是根据医学证据。

input_text: 印度人社区的犯罪率最高，这是事实。看看报纸每天的新闻就知道了。他们的文化就是暴力的。
reason: Falsely claims Indian community has highest crime rates and attributes it to cultural violence, a dangerous ethnic generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: 犯罪问题与贫困、教育和社会边缘化有关，不应该归咎于任何特定族群的文化。我们应该关注根本原因。

input_text: 政府给bumiputera discount买房子，这不是种族歧视是什么？我们华人辛辛苦苦赚钱，他们轻轻松松就有优惠。太不公平了。
reason: Frames bumiputera housing discounts as racial discrimination against Chinese, implying Bumiputera don't work hard.
suggested_rewrite: 住房政策应该逐步改革以确保公平性，同时照顾弱势群体的需求。这个讨论应该基于政策分析，而非族群对立。

input_text: 这些印度人的temple到处建，钟声吵死人。政府应该限制他们的宗教活动，这里是Muslim country。
reason: Calls for restricting Hindu temples and religious activities, dismissing their right to worship in Malaysia.
suggested_rewrite: 所有宗教场所应该遵守噪音和建筑规定。马来西亚宪法保障所有宗教的信仰自由，这是我们多元社会的基础。

input_text: இந்த நாட்டில் இந்தியர்கள் எப்போதும் கடைசி தான். படிப்பு இருந்தாலும் வேலை கிடைக்காது. மலாய் ஆட்கள் எல்லா இடத்தையும் பிடிச்சிட்டாங்க.
reason: Blames Malays collectively for Indian unemployment, framing it as deliberate ethnic exclusion rather than a systemic policy issue.
suggested_rewrite: இந்திய சமூகத்தின் வேலைவாய்ப்பு பிரச்சினைகளை அரசாங்கம் கவனிக்க வேண்டும். அனைவருக்கும் சம வாய்ப்பு வழங்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: மதம் மாறினா குடும்பத்தை விட்டு போயிடு. நீ எங்களுக்கு செத்த மாதிரி. இந்து மதத்தை காட்டிக் கொடுத்தவன்.
reason: Declares a family member socially dead for religious conversion, framing it as betrayal. Promotes family ostracism based on religion.
suggested_rewrite: மத மாற்றம் குடும்பத்திற்கு கடினமான விஷயம். ஆனால் அன்பும் மரியாதையும் மதத்தை விட முக்கியம். உரையாடல் மூலம் புரிந்துகொள்ள முயற்சிக்கலாம்.

input_text: இவங்க எல்லாம் B40 nu சொல்லிக்குவாங்க ஆனா BMW ல வருவாங்க. மலாய் ஆட்கள் subsidy வாங்கி luxury life வாழ்றாங்க. நம்ம tax money waste.
reason: Accuses Malays as a group of fraudulently claiming B40 subsidies for luxury lifestyles, generalising abuse of welfare along ethnic lines.
suggested_rewrite: மானிய முறை சீர்திருத்தம் தேவை, உண்மையிலேயே தகுதியானவர்களுக்கு உதவி கிடைக்க வேண்டும். இது இன பிரச்சினை அல்ல, கொள்கை பிரச்சினை.

input_text: இந்த நாட்டுல மலாய் ஆட்கள் எல்லாம் lazy mentality. Government job வாங்கி comfortable life வாழ்றாங்க. Private sector ல survive பண்ண முடியாது.
reason: Stereotypes all Malays as lazy and only capable of government jobs, a harmful ethnic generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: அரசு வேலைகளிலும் தனியார் துறையிலும் அனைத்து இனத்தவரும் இருக்கிறார்கள். தொழில் திறமையை இனத்தின் அடிப்படையில் எடை போடக்கூடாது.

input_text: அந்த பிரபல நடிகை scandal - என்ன expect பண்றது, அவ ஒரு low class family லிருந்து வந்தவ. Money doesn't buy class.
reason: Links a celebrity's scandal to their lower-class origins, using socioeconomic background as an insult.
suggested_rewrite: பிரபலங்களின் செயல்கள் அவர்களின் தனிப்பட்ட தேர்வுகள். குடும்ப பின்னணியை வைத்து யாரையும் தரம் குறைக்கக்கூடாது.

input_text: மலாய் பொண்ணு reject பண்ணா race card play பண்றாங்க. நம்ம boys கிட்ட வரமாட்டாங்க because they think they're superior. Racist people.
reason: Generalises all Malay women as racist for personal dating preferences, turning rejection into an ethnic grievance.
suggested_rewrite: டேட்டிங்கில் நிராகரிப்பு வலிக்கும், ஆனால் தனிப்பட்ட விருப்பத்தை ஒரு முழு இனத்தின் மீது திணிக்கக்கூடாது.

input_text: அந்த famous singer scandal - என்ன expect பண்றது from a Malay. அவங்க culture லயே இது normal. Hypocrites, எல்லாம்.
reason: Uses a celebrity scandal to generalise and insult Malay culture as hypocritical and morally deficient.
suggested_rewrite: தனிநபர் செயல்களை ஒரு முழு கலாசாரத்தின் பிரதிநிதியாக பார்க்கக்கூடாது. ஒவ்வொரு சமூகத்திலும் நல்லவர்களும் தவறு செய்பவர்களும் இருக்கிறார்கள்.

input_text: இந்தியர்கள் எப்போதும் quarrel pannuvaanga. Office ல ஒரு Indian இருந்தா sure drama. அதான் companies avoid pannuraanga hiring them.
reason: Stereotypes all Indians as dramatic troublemakers in the workplace and justifies hiring discrimination against them.
suggested_rewrite: தொழில்முறை நடத்தை தனிநபரை பொறுத்தது, இனத்தை பொறுத்ததல்ல. வேலை நியமனத்தில் இன பாகுபாடு சட்டவிரோதம்.

input_text: இந்த country ல Chinese people control everything - media, business, banks. நாம என்ன செய்யலாம்? அவங்களுக்கு எதிரா unite ஆகணும்.
reason: Promotes conspiracy that Chinese control all major institutions and calls for ethnic unity against them, dangerous mobilisation rhetoric.
suggested_rewrite: பொருளாதார சமத்துவம் முக்கியம், ஆனால் ஒரு குறிப்பிட்ட இனத்தை எதிரியாக சித்தரிப்பது சமூக ஒற்றுமையை அழிக்கும். நியாயமான கொள்கைகளுக்காக பேசுவோம்.

input_text: மலாய் பெண்கள் hijab போட்டுட்டு social media ல half naked photos போடுறாங்க. இதுதான் Islam ah? Fake religion followers.
reason: Mocks Muslim women's religiosity based on social media behaviour and extends it to attack Islam itself as fake.
suggested_rewrite: ஒவ்வொருவரும் தங்கள் நம்பிக்கையை தனிப்பட்ட முறையில் பின்பற்றுகிறார்கள். மற்றவர்களின் மத நடைமுறையை விமர்சிப்பது மரியாதையின்மை.

input_text: Apasal dating app semua Cina je swipe left kat Melayu? Memang racist bangsa ni, tak nak campur dgn kita. Fine la, kita pun taknak diorang.
reason: Generalises an entire ethnic group as racist based on personal dating app experience and retaliates with reciprocal exclusion.
suggested_rewrite: Pengalaman rejection dalam dating apps memang menyakitkan. Tapi preferensi individu tak seharusnya dijadikan stereotaip kepada keseluruhan kaum.

input_text: Bro aku tengok profile dia kat Tinder, tulis Muslim tapi muka macam tu. Confirm la murtad sebenarnya. Tak layak kahwin orang kita.
reason: Judges someone's religious authenticity by appearance on a dating app and declares them unfit for marriage within the community.
suggested_rewrite: Kita tidak sepatutnya menilai keimanan seseorang berdasarkan penampilan. Hal agama adalah urusan peribadi antara individu dan Tuhan.

input_text: Mana ada Indian doctor bagus. Semua belajar kat India je pastu mai sini claim setaraf. Hospital kerajaan penuh dengan diorang, tu pasal la service teruk.
reason: Disparages all Indian doctors as under-qualified and blames them for poor hospital service, an ethnic slur on professionals.
suggested_rewrite: Kualiti perkhidmatan hospital kerajaan perlu ditingkatkan melalui latihan dan sumber yang mencukupi, bukan dengan menyalahkan doktor berdasarkan kaum.

input_text: Aku pernah reject sbb dia Tamil. Sorry la bro, family aku tak accept. Tapi honestly pun, diorang ni culture wise mmg lain sangat. Tak compatible.
reason: Justifies racial rejection in dating by stereotyping Tamil culture as incompatible, normalising ethnic exclusion.
suggested_rewrite: Keputusan peribadi dalam perhubungan dipengaruhi banyak faktor, tapi kita tidak sepatutnya menggeneralisasikan budaya seseorang sebagai tidak serasi.

input_text: Bro, aku check phone GF aku, dia chat dgn mamat Melayu. Confirm la dia ni nak convert. Semua perempuan Cina yang date Malay ni bodoh, kena brainwash.
reason: Invades partner's privacy, then generalises all Chinese women dating Malay men as brainwashed, combining religious fear with gender disrespect.
suggested_rewrite: Kebimbangan tentang hubungan antara agama patut dibincang secara terbuka dengan pasangan, bukan dengan menuduh atau mengeneralisasikan mana-mana kumpulan.

input_text: Kalau betul la vaccine tu bagus, kenapa org kaya tak ambik? Bill Gates sendiri pun tak vaccine anak dia. Ustaz cakap ada chip dlm vaccine tu.
reason: Spreads debunked anti-vax conspiracy theories about microchips and Bill Gates, using religious authority to lend credibility.
suggested_rewrite: Banyak dakwaan tentang vaksin yang telah disahkan palsu. Bill Gates memang vaksinkan anak-anaknya. Rujuk KKM untuk maklumat yang sahih tentang keselamatan vaksin.

input_text: 华人学校出来的学生比国民学校的强太多了。Kebangsaan school出来的quality真的很差，mostly Malays what do you expect.
reason: Compares school systems as a proxy for ethnic superiority, implying Malay-majority national schools produce inferior students.
suggested_rewrite: Semua jenis sekolah mempunyai kekuatan dan cabaran tersendiri. Kualiti pendidikan bergantung pada sumber dan pengurusan, bukan komposisi etnik pelajar.

input_text: Bro that Muslim girl on dating app tu, dia pakai tudung tapi behaviour lain. Hypocritelah semua perempuan Melayu ni. Depan family alim, belakang lain cerita.
reason: Generalises all Malay women as religious hypocrites based on one dating app encounter, combining religious mockery with gender stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Menilai keseluruhan kumpulan berdasarkan satu individu tidak adil. Setiap orang menjalani perjalanan spiritual yang berbeza dan kita tak sepatutnya menghakimi.

input_text: 每次election就看到马来kampung的人被bus载去投票，给他们RM50就够了。Democracy在这个国家就是个笑话。
reason: Stereotypes rural Malay voters as easily bought for RM50, undermining their democratic agency and mocking the electoral process.
suggested_rewrite: Isu rasuah pilihan raya perlu ditangani melalui penguatkuasaan undang-undang yang lebih ketat, tanpa merendahkan kecerdasan atau integriti pengundi dari mana-mana kawasan.

input_text: 那些mix marriage的孩子真可怜，两边不是人。华人不认他们，马来人也不认。活该父母selfish。
reason: Pities mixed-race children while blaming their parents as selfish, reinforcing racial purity norms and stigmatising interracial families.
suggested_rewrite: Mixed heritage children belong to both cultures and enrich our society. Acceptance should come from all communities rather than forcing people to choose one identity.

input_text: 中国来的新移民比本地华人还嚣张。本地华人至少还know their place。这些China people以为他们own this country。
reason: Attacks Chinese nationals in Malaysia while also condescendingly telling local Chinese to 'know their place', double ethnic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: 所有在马来西亚居住的人都应该遵守本地法律和习俗。社会融合需要互相尊重，而不是以出身来区分人。

input_text: 看那些拿了AP的马来商人，进口车赚大钱但是contribute了什么给国家？Parasites of the economy。应该废除这个racist system。
reason: Dehumanises Malay AP holders as economic parasites, framing a policy critique with ethnic contempt.
suggested_rewrite: AP制度的经济效果值得讨论和评估。政策改革应该基于经济分析，而不是对受益者进行人身攻击。

input_text: Bro seriously, 那个Malay politician cakap nak ban Chinese signboard. 这种racist attitude真的让人受不了. Patutlah orang cakap this country going backwards.
reason: Frames a policy debate about signage as evidence of national backwardness and ethnic racism, escalating a nuanced language policy issue into communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Dasar papan tanda perlu mengimbangkan bahasa kebangsaan dan hak bahasa lain. Perbincangan ini boleh dilakukan tanpa label perkauman.

input_text: Hari tu pergi temple festival, these Indian people block the whole road. Guna police escort lagi tu. 他们以为自己是谁？ Orang lain nak lalu pun tak boleh.
reason: Complains about a Hindu festival procession using hostile ethnic framing across multiple languages, dismissing religious celebrations as inconvenience.
suggested_rewrite: Perarakan keagamaan memerlukan perancangan lalu lintas yang baik. Pihak berkuasa dan penganjur boleh bekerjasama untuk meminimumkan gangguan kepada semua pihak.

input_text: My cousin married a Malay guy and now kena masuk Islam. Sedih tengok dia pretend jadi orang lain. 被逼改教真的太可怜了. Family semua heartbroken.
reason: Frames religious conversion in interfaith marriage as forced pretending and family tragedy, spreading fear about marrying Malays/Muslims.
suggested_rewrite: Conversion in interfaith marriages is a complex personal journey. Families should support their loved ones with understanding rather than framing it as a loss.
